It is not something that you can double up on. Like we genuinely recommend this is not a marketing warning. You generally recommend everyone just start with one tablet per day just to see how their body adjusts to it. Our biggest fear of all of the products was that this one was going to be too strong. This one is seriously hardcore. So that's the reason I did like instead of saying hey everyone should get this if someone does get clogged up or has that issue just tell them that they need to take this and take one the first couple days and then if they really want to level up the two they can but it too is the absolute maximum that you should take per day and they should take it in the morning. They definitely do not want to take it in the evening. If they do they will get some serious runs and not be able to sleep. So do not do that. Make sure they take it in the morning so they can go to the bathroom during the day like an all human being. But yeah so you take the bookends of a program. The first week is just when people are getting acclimated and that's when they usually get clogged up because an increase in protein without corresponding increase in fiber tends to get people a little cloggy and so that's when they would take it and then again obviously the last week before if they're like a couple pounds behind something like this can actually make a really big difference for them. So the reason that I see this as a spot fix is that this is something that I think that the occasion will come up.
